title: Fix whisper_binary_path for .exe suffix

context.bug: Hardcoded filename "whisper-cli". On Windows the binary is "whisper-cli.exe" so every candidate path misses.

fix_strategy.use_constant: std::env::consts::EXE_SUFFIX (empty string on unix, ".exe" on windows)

steps: Replace literal "whisper-cli" string usages with format!() using EXE_SUFFIX
Keep fallback PathBuf::from(name) at end of fn
Verify on Linux: name resolves to "whisper-cli" (suffix empty)
acceptance: On Linux dev: dev_bin path = src-tauri/binaries/whisper-cli (unchanged)
On Windows dev: dev_bin path = src-tauri/binaries/whisper-cli.exe
No string literal "whisper-cli" remains without EXE_SUFFIX in models.rs
